{{Quote|You will not defeat us! You may kill us, but you will not defeat us. You will never defeat us!|B'shith Vorrik to Gilad Pellaeon|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic III: Reunion">''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic III: Reunion]]''</ref>}}
'''B'shith Vorrik''' was the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] commander assigned to undertake the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] invasion of the [[Imperial Remnant]]. His face and scalp were almost completely devoid of skin.

==Biography==
{{Quote|You may win the occasional battle against us, Vorrik, but the Empire will always strike back.|Gilad Pellaeon|<ref name="Remnant">''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]''</ref>}}
After winning the initial [[Battle of Bastion]] in [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]], he pursued the fleeing [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Starfleet]] to [[Borosk/Legends|Borosk]], where he planned to defeat them. However, he did not anticipate the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance's]] support of the Imperials, and thus lost the [[Battle of Borosk (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Borosk]]. He [[Battle of Yaga Minor (Yuuzhan Vong War)|indecisively raided]] [[Yaga Minor/Legends|Yaga Minor]], but decided to flee towards [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] instead of facing the approaching Imperial fleet.

Vorrik then was tasked with destroying the [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] relay on [[Esfandia/Legends|Esfandia]], but once more underestimated his Human opponents—this time not expecting his nemesis, [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]], to have been willing to leave the Remnant. This surprise, as well as Pellaeon's taunting, made Vorrik distracted enough during the [[Battle of Esfandia]] to become susceptible to the proposal of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Tahiri Veila]], who suggested that he send a portion of his forces down to the planet itself while the battle was still continuing.

Pellaeon was able to destroy the divided Yuuzhan Vong forces easily, and enraged, Vorrik attempted to ram Pellaeon's ship, the ''[[Right to Rule]]'', with his [[Kur-hashan|own command ship]]. However, the Imperial fleet destroyed Vorrik's ship well before he reached his target, killing him and everyone else on board. Shortly thereafter, the rest of his fleet met the same fate. [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] jokingly christened the resulting space wreckage [[Vorrik's Folly]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]'' {{1st}}
